message:
fix(vercel): remove framework specification for monorepo build

Setting framework: null prevents Vercel from looking for Next.js
in the root package.json. The build command handles everything.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "$schema": "https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json",
-  "framework": "nextjs",
   "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run build",
   "installCommand": "bun install",
-  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next"
+  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next",
+  "framework": null
 }
